stock.alt: Modern urban roofline and glass towers under an overcast sky
stock.label: Contact Page Hero Stock Image
stock.notes: Selected for the contact-page hero because the broad roofline and distant glass towers produce a calmer page-title banner that is closer to the reference contact page rhythm than the previous control-room scene.

candidates.label: Nano Contact Hero Candidate
candidates.prompt:
{
  "asset_type": "contact page hero background image",
  "business_context": "Rally Technology, an industrial automation and control integration company",
  "page_role": "Calm, wide-angle banner for the Contact Us page",
  "goal": "Create a modern urban skyline or corporate facility exterior that suggests stability, professional scale, and global reach.",
  "visual_message": "A high-end, technologically advanced corporate or industrial exterior.",
  "technical_signals": {
    "lens": "35mm wide-angle architectural photography",
    "aperture": "f/11 for sharp details across the scene",
    "light_source": "natural, overcast daylight for soft shadows and professional mood",
    "time_of_day": "mid-day or early afternoon overcast",
    "motion_rule": "static, peaceful"
  },
  "spatial_positioning": [
    "wide horizontal sweep of a modern roofline or glass facade in the midground",
    "distorted or layered skyscrapers in the distant background",
    "generous negative space in the center-top and center for large typography overlay"
  ],
  "color_restriction": "cool greys, slate blues, muted steel, and clean glass reflections",
  "material_notes": [
    "reflective glass",
    "brushed aluminum or concrete architectural elements",
    "subtle urban texture"
  ],
  "scene": "A wide-angle shot of a modern architectural skyline under a soft overcast sky, featuring a prominent horizontal roofline structure.",
  "subject": "Modern industrial architecture and urban stability.",
  "reality_anchors": [
    "clean geometric architectural lines",
    "realistic glass reflections",
    "natural atmospheric haze in the distance"
  ],
  "composition": {
    "format": "21:9 or wide panoramic",
    "focal_structure": "horizontal layering",
    "camera": "eye-level architectural photography"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "style": "clean, high-key overcast",
    "direction": "diffused from above"
  },
  "negative_prompt": "text, logos, buttons, website UI elements, people, interior scenes, busy traffic, chaotic elements, neon lights"
}
candidates.notes: Initial AI candidate for contact hero overhaul

candidates.label: Nano Contact Hero Candidate
candidates.prompt:
{
  "asset_type": "pure industrial background plate",
  "business_context": "Rally Technology, an industrial automation and control integration company",
  "page_role": "Calm, wide-angle banner for the Contact Us page",
  "goal": "Create a modern urban skyline or corporate facility exterior that suggests stability, professional scale, and global reach. THE IMAGE MUST BE COMPLETELY FREE OF ANY EMBEDDED TEXT, SLOGANS, LOGOS, BUTTONS, OR WEBSITE UI ELEMENTS.",
  "visual_message": "A high-end, technologically advanced corporate or industrial exterior.",
  "technical_signals": {
    "lens": "35mm wide-angle architectural photography",
    "aperture": "f/11 for sharp details across the scene",
    "light_source": "natural, overcast daylight for soft shadows and professional mood",
    "time_of_day": "mid-day or early afternoon overcast",
    "motion_rule": "static, peaceful"
  },
  "spatial_positioning": [
    "wide horizontal sweep of a modern roofline or glass facade in the midground",
    "distorted or layered skyscrapers in the distant background"
  ],
  "color_restriction": "cool greys, slate blues, muted steel, and clean glass reflections",
  "material_notes": [
    "reflective glass",
    "brushed aluminum or concrete architectural elements",
    "subtle urban texture"
  ],
  "scene": "A wide-angle shot of a modern architectural skyline under a soft overcast sky, featuring a prominent horizontal roofline structure.",
  "subject": "Modern industrial architecture and urban stability.",
  "reality_anchors": [
    "clean geometric architectural lines",
    "realistic glass reflections",
    "natural atmospheric haze in the distance"
  ],
  "composition": {
    "format": "21:9 or wide panoramic",
    "focal_structure": "horizontal layering",
    "camera": "eye-level architectural photography"
  },
  "lighting": {
    "style": "clean, high-key overcast",
    "direction": "diffused from above"
  },
  "negative_prompt": "",
  "avoid": [
    "embedded text",
    "slogans",
    "logos",
    "buttons",
    "CTA elements",
    "website UI overlays",
    "graphic design artifacts",
    "watermarks",
    "HUD decorations on screens",
    "fake headlines"
  ]
}
candidates.notes: Global Pro-model visual upgrade. STRICT REQUIREMENT: NO EMBEDDED TEXT, NO SLOGANS, NO LOGOS, NO UI ELEMENTS.
